headlines.title: X-Men actor Tyler Mane says he was diagnosed with breast cancer and urges men to get checked
headlines.description: Retired wrestler Tyler Mane, known for his role in the X-Men franchise, revealed Tuesday that he had been diagnosed with breast cancer.

headlines.title: GLP-1 overdoses increase at an alarming rate as weight loss drugs become easier to buy online
headlines.description: Within 24 hours of injecting the first dose of a weight loss medication she received following a visit with a telehealth doctor, Karleigh McClain was admitted to the hospital, she said

headlines.title: Good news: You don’t need surgery. But you’ll have to apply maggots to your wound.
headlines.description: The lowly maggot gets a bad rap, mostly known for feeding on corpses and rotting meat.

headlines.title: FDA Approves Breakthrough Sunscreen Ingredient: What to Know
headlines.description: The FDA has approved the first new sunscreen ingredient in more than 25 years. Dermatologist Dr. Michelle Henry joins TODAY to break down everything you need to know about bemotrizinol.

headlines.title: Doctor Breaks Down Commonly Misunderstood Medical Terms
headlines.description: Board-certified surgeon Dr. Cedrek McFadden joins TODAY to explain commonly misunderstood medical terminology including infection vs. inflammation, screenings vs. diagnostic tests, benign vs. malignant and more.

headlines.title: Drugmakers developing monthly weight loss drugs rather than weekly
headlines.description: Pfizer and Amgen are developing monthly GLP-1 shots with the goal being to make weight loss drugs more convenient and easier to maintain. Injections made by Wegovy and Zepbound are taken weekly. NBC News' Berkeley Lovelace, Jr. explains how users may benefit.

headlines.title: New Report Sheds Light on How Kids Are Using AI
headlines.description: Common Sense Media founder and CEO Jim Steyer joins TODAY to share a new report that is shedding light on how younger people are using AI and breaks down the potential warning signs that parents should watch out for. “This is a wakeup call for every parent out there,” he says.

headlines.title: Is this $178 bra actually life-changing?
headlines.description: I tested the Forme Power Bra for five months to see if it could improve my posture and back support. Here’s what actually happened.

headlines.title: The best running watches, tested over hundreds of miles
headlines.description: I’ve tested dozens of running watches from Garmin, Coros, Amazfit, Fitbit, Apple and more. Here are my top picks for beginners, races and ultra-athletes alike.

headlines.title: The best men’s walking shoes of 2026, tested and reviewed
headlines.description: Shop expert-recommended and staff-tested men’s walking shoes from Brooks, On, New Balance and Hoka.

headlines.title: I’ve tested dozens of workout headphones: These are the best
headlines.description: I tested over a dozen workout headphones from brands like Apple, Beats, and Shokz to find our top picks for running, biking, the gym and more.

headlines.title: FDA allows popular sunscreen ingredient long used in Europe and Asia
headlines.description: Advocates and sunscreen enthusiasts have been pushing for the U.S. to allow bemotrizinol for years.
